perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young female creator in a floral dress eating a snack in a room; a split screen shows a fridge and a bowl of cereal. (2) She prepares cornflakes with cold water, takes a bite, and shows a look of intense disgust and rejection. (3) She grabs a black leather bag, walks outside on a tiled pavement, and arrives at a CoCo bubble tea shop. (4) She holds a large cup of milk tea with pearls, takes a sip, and looks delighted. (5) At home, she pours the large drink into a glass bowl, adding toppings like grass jelly and taro balls, and finally adds the remaining cornflakes. (6) She eats the mixture with a large blue-and-white spoon, making exaggerated expressions of enjoyment while looking directly at the camera. (7) Close-up shots of the drink being prepared at the store and the creator holding the cup with promotional details follow.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays. A high-pitched female voice speaks energetically in Mandarin. Crunching sound effects are heard. (2) Comical 'fail' sound effects and a low groan occur as she tries the cereal with water. (3) Sound of footsteps and muffled outdoor ambient noise as she travels. (4) Liquid pouring and splashing sounds as she mixes the drink into a bowl. (5) Loud, rhythmic slurping and chewing sounds (ASMR-style) dominate as she eats the mixture. (6) Music remains upbeat through the end, concluding with an enthusiastic promotional delivery of the '2 for 99' offer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '美國爆紅吃法？玉米片加冷水' (Functional: US viral way to eat? Cornflakes with cold water). (2) '真的嗎....' (Decorative: Really.... with a shocked emoji). (3) '想到更好的方法了！' (Functional: Thought of a better way!). (4) '冬韻擂焙珍奶' (Functional: Winter Lei Cha Roasted Pearl Milk Tea). (5) '珍珠爆多' (Decorative: So many pearls). (6) '完美' (Decorative: Perfect). (7) '2杯99元' (Functional: 2 cups for 99 dollars - Hook). (8) '趕快前往CoCo吧~' (Functional: Hurry to CoCo~).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Trend Hook -> Failed Experiment -> Problem Solving -> Product Demonstration -> Mukbang Review -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing in all scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long, dark, wavy hair, wearing a pink floral-patterned dress over a brown knit sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with a 'HAPPINESS IS HAPPENING' poster; a grey tiled outdoor street; the brightly lit counter and menu board of a CoCo bubble tea shop.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting indoors; natural daylight for outdoor transitions.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for CoCo's new beverage line. It uses a popular but unappealing food trend (cereal with water) as a narrative device to introduce a 'superior' alternative using the brand's 'Winter Lei Cha Roasted Pearl Milk Tea'. The content transitions into a mukbang format to demonstrate product enjoyment and concludes with a specific price-point promotion to drive sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video specifically mentions a brand new product, shows the brand logo repeatedly, and provides a clear price discount promotion for the viewer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration, frequent use of variety-show style stickers, and 'Trend vs. Reality' comparison logic.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The creator leverages ASMR eating sounds and high-energy delivery to maintain engagement, typical of modern short-form commercial content on platforms like TikTok or Reels.
